positive: Minimalist symmetrical abstract depiction of celestial mountain peaks and a rising crescent moon, rendered in deep indigo and celestial gold lines, resembling a stylized Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e style). The composition features bold, clean silhouettes and negative space, centered on a majestic, curved archway formed by the peaks. The style should be highly graphic, clean lines, strong contrast, and suitable for single-color textile printing. Flat graphic design, elegant, ethereal, maximal negative space.
